feed.title: dinnerhunt
feed.subtitle: 人在武汉，刚下钻石公主号

entry.title: 「 2019CCPC」- 江西省赛
entry.content:
HDU - 6567 Cotree

  • 题意
    给两棵树，可以在两棵树中添加一条边，使其变成一棵树，求∑in∑i+1ndis(i,j)\sum _i ^n \sum _{i+1} ^n dis(i,j)∑in​∑i+1n​dis(i,j) , dis(i,j)dis(i,j)dis(i,j) 表示点iii 与点jjj的距离

  • 题解
    因为任意两点之间的路径是唯一的，考虑树上一点xxx，如果点xxx的祖先节点要到达xxx的儿子节点，则一定需要经过点xxx。因此设sz[x]sz[x]sz[x] 为点xxx所包含的字节点数量(包括自身)，则xxx被经过的次数为点sz[x]∗(n−sz[x])sz[x] * (n- sz[x])sz[x]∗(n−sz[x])， 则总数量为 ∑insz[i]∗(n−sz[i])\sum _i^n sz[i] * (n- sz[i])∑in​sz[i]∗(n−sz[i])

  • 代码

// 代码比较傻，因错误考虑，以为连接树的重心结果最优，实际无论怎样连，结果都一样
const ll maxd = 3e5+10;
V G[maxd];
ll d[maxd],sz[maxd],n,nod,num,ans,ss;
void dfs(ll x,ll fa,ll sd)
{
    d[x] = 1;
    ll mx = 0;
    for(auto v: G[x])
    {
        if(v != fa)
        {
            dfs(v,x,sd);
            d[x] += d[v];
            mx = max(mx,d[v]);
        }
    }
    mx = max(mx,sd-d[x]);
    if(mx < num)
    {
        nod = x;
        num = mx;
    }
}
void dfs1(ll x,ll fa)
{
    sz[x] = 1;
    for(auto v:G[x])
    {
        if(v==fa) continue;
        dfs1(v,x);
        sz[x]+=sz[v];
    }
    ans += (n - sz[x]) * sz[x];
}
void dfs3(ll x,ll fa)
{
    ss++;
    for(auto v: G[x]) if(v != fa) dfs3(v,x);
}
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    RLL(n);ll a,b;
    FOR(j,1,n-2)
    {
        RLL2(a,b);
        G[a].pb(b);G[b].pb(a);
    }
    nod = 0, num = 1e9+10;
    dfs3(1,0);
    dfs(1,0,ss);
    a = nod;
    FOR(i,1,n)
        if(d[i] == 0)
        {
            nod = 0, num = 1e9+10;
            dfs(i, 0,n-ss);
            b = nod;
            break;
        }
    G[a].pb(b); G[b].pb(a);
    dfs1(1,0);
    PLN(ans);
    return 0;
}

HDU - 6574 Rng

  • 题意
    随机从范围[1,n][1,n][1,n]选取一个右端点ArA_rAr​ ，再从范围[1,Ar][1,A_r][1,Ar​]中选取一个左端点AlA_lAl​ ， 接着从范围[1,n][1,n][1,n]选取一个右端点BrB_rBr​,最后从范围[1,Br][1,B_r][1,Br​]中选取一个左端点BlB_lBl​
    求区间 [Al,Ar]与[Bl,Br][A_l,A_r] \text{与} [B_l,B_r][Al​,Ar​]与[Bl​,Br​] 相交的概率为多少 ，结果关于 modmodmod取模，分数取逆元

  • 题解
    我们考虑求出不相交概率，然后用111减去不相交，就是相交概率
    设 a[i]a[i]a[i] 为区间左端点选到iii的概率
    则a[i]=∑j=in1ja[i] = \sum _{j=i}^n \frac{1}{j}a[i]=∑j=in​j1​ , (样例2，区间左端点取到111的概率为 12+14\frac{1}{2} + \frac{1}{4}21​+41​, 右端点取到111的概率为12\frac{1}{2}21​,此时左端点必为111，右端点取到222，则左端点能取到111 或222 ， 因此概率为 34\frac{3}{4}43​)
    可以从后往前，线性时间内推出 a[i]a[i]a[i]
    当区间AlA_lAl​为 iii 时，[Bl][B_l][Bl​] 小于 iii时，则两区间不相交，考虑枚举iii，此时的概率为a[i]×i−1na[i] \times \frac{i-1}{n}a[i]×ni−1​
    同理，考虑BlB_lBl​ 大于 ArA_rAr​时的概率与上面相同，因此直接乘二即可

  • 代码

const ll maxd = 2e6+10;
ll a[maxd];
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll n;
    while(RLL(n)!=EOF)
    {
        a[n+1] = 0;
        _FOR(i,n,1) a[i] = a[i+1]  + fpow(i*n,mod-2) %mod;
        ll lsum = 0; // A在B后面的总概率
        FOR(i,1,n)  (lsum +=a[i] *  (i-1) * fpow(n,mod-2))%=mod;
        ll y = 1, x = ((y - lsum * 2 ) %mod+mod) %mod;
        PLN(x);
    }
    return 0;
}

HDU - 6568 Math

参考题解

  • 题意
    你需要从位置000 走到位置ddd，你身上带了一个机器人 ，你每回合可以移动一格，并且每回合会发生如下事情

    1. 如果身上带着机器人，它有ppp的概率掉落在原地
    2. 如果机器人不在身上，你会有qqq的概率发现它丢了，如果此时位置为ddd，则你一定会发现它丢了
    3. 如果你发现机器人丢了，你会一直往左走，直到找到机器人 ，否则你往右走

  • 题解
    设s(i)s(i)s(i)为从位iii走到位置i+1i+1i+1的期望
    如果机器人没丢，则期望步数为 (1−p)×1(1-p) \times 1(1−p)×1
    如果丢了，你走到位置xxx才发现，则期望步数为(1−q)x−i∗q∗2∗(x−i)(1-q)^{x-i} * q * 2 * (x-i)(1−q)x−i∗q∗2∗(x−i) , 特别的,xxx上限为d−1d-1d−1 ，当x==dx == dx==d时，期望为 (1−q)d−i∗q∗2∗(d−i)(1-q)^{d-i} * q * 2 * (d-i)(1−q)d−i∗q∗2∗(d−i)
    丢了之后会走回原地，因此需要重新考虑一边s(i)s(i)s(i) ,整理后
    s(i)=(1−p)×1+p×(s(i)+(1−q)d−i∗q∗2∗(d−i)+(∑x=id−1(1−q)x−i∗q∗2∗(x−i)))s(i) = (1-p) \times 1 + p \times (s(i) +(1-q)^{d-i} * q * 2 * (d-i) + ( \sum_{x = i}^{d-1} (1-q)^{x-i} * q * 2 * (x-i)) )s(i)=(1−p)×1+p×(s(i)+(1−q)d−i∗q∗2∗(d−i)+(∑x=id−1​(1−q)x−i∗q∗2∗(x−i)))

  • 代码

const ll mod = 1e9+7;
const ll maxd = 1e5+10;
double a[maxd],b[maxd];
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll n; double p,q;
    while(RLL(n)!=EOF)
    {
        RLF(p);RLF(q);
        a[0] = 1; b[0] = 0;
        FOR(i,1,n)
        {
            a[i] = a[i-1] * (1-q);
            b[i] = b[i-1] + a[i] * i;
        }
        double ans = 0;
        F(n) ans += 1 + (2 * p * (a[n-i] * (n-i) + q * b[n-i-1])) / (1 - p);
        printf("%.10lf\n",ans);
    }
    return 0;
}

HDU - 6569 Trap

  • 题意
    有nnn根长度为aia_iai​线段，求组成不同种等腰梯形的数量种类 ，且该梯形所有边的最大公约数为111

  • 题解
    先不考虑最大公约数为111，因为数据范围为4000,因此可以枚举梯形的底边与腰。
    设上底为AAA，下底为BBB ,腰为CCC，且A<BA < BA<B
    考虑枚举上边AAA 与CCC，则$ A <= B <= A + 2 * C$
    可以通过前缀和求出
    因为要求最大公约数为111, 我们设F(i)F(i)F(i) 为最大公约数为 iii 的倍数的方案数，然后通过莫比乌斯进行容斥，求出最大公约数为111的方案数
    如果求F(i)F(i)F(i) ，我们可以把枚举iii,然后只把长度为iii的倍数的线段拿出来构造梯形，这样构造出梯形的最大公约数一定是iii的倍数

  • 代码

const ll maxd = 10010;
vector<vector<ll> > vec,fac;
ll pri[maxd],mu[maxd],tot;
ll cnt[maxd],a[maxd];
bool vis[maxd];
void init()
{
    fac.resize(maxd); mu[1] = 1;
    FOR(i,2,maxd-1)
    {
        if(!vis[i]) pri[++tot] = i,mu[i] =-1;
        FOR(j,1,tot)
        {
            if(i*pri[j] >= maxd) break;
            vis[i*pri[j]] = 1;
            if(i%pri[j] == 0)
            {
                mu[i*pri[j]] = 0;
                break;
            }
            else mu[i*pri[j]] = -mu[i];
        }
    }
    FOR(i,1,maxd)
        for(ll j=1;j*i<maxd;j++) fac[i*j].pb(i);
}
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll n;
    init();
    while(RLL(n)!=EOF)
    {
        vec.resize(maxd);
        MM(cnt,0);
        FOR(i,1,n) RLL(a[i]);
        FOR(i,1,n) cnt[a[i]]++;
        FOR(i,1,n)
        {
            for(auto x: fac[a[i]])
            {
                vec[x].pb(a[i]);
            }
        }
        ll ans = 0;
        FOR(i,1,maxd-1)
        {
//            PLN(mu[i]);
            if(!vec[i].size() || mu[i] == 0) continue;
            ll sum = 0;
            sort(all(vec[i]));

            vec[i].erase(unique(all(vec[i])),vec[i].end());
//            PLN(i);
//            for(auto x:vec[i]) PLP(x);
//            PN();

            ll num  = vec[i].size();
            for(auto j:vec[i]) // 上底
            {
                ll l =0 , r=0;
                while(l < num && vec[i][l] < j + 1) l++; // 下底
                for(auto k: vec[i]) // 枚举腰
                {
                    if( k != j && cnt[k] >= 2)
                    {
                        while( r < num-1 && vec[i][r+1] < j+ k*2) r++;
                        if(l< num && r < num && l <= r)
                        {
                            sum += r-l+1;
                            if(vec[i][l] <= k && k <=vec[i][r] && cnt[k] < 3) sum--;
                        }
                    }
                    else if(j == k && cnt[j] >= 3) // 如果上底与高相同
                    {
                        while(r < num-1 && vec[i][r+1] < j + k * 2) r++;
                        if(l < num && r< num && l<=r) sum += r - l + 1;
                    }
                }
            }
            ans += sum * mu[i];
//            PLN(sum);
//            PN();
        }
        PLN(ans);
    }
    return 0;
}

HDU - 6571 Packing

  • 题意
    有mmm个传送带与nnn个物品，第iii个物品第tit_iti​秒会被送到第mmm床送带，你可以在一秒中之内将一个物品从一个床送带上拿下来，每个传送带可容纳的商品数量为aia_iai​，当一秒结束时，如果第iii条传送带上的剩余物品数量numinum_inumi​大于aia_iai​，则会收取ai−numia_i -num_iai​−numi​的价钱 ，如果安排你的时间，使得价钱最少

  • 题解

    v2[i]v2[i]v2[i] 到iii时刻时共有多少个物品到达
    v1[i]v1[i]v1[i] 到iii时刻时共有多少个物品超过限制

  • 代码

const ll maxd = 1e6+10;
ll a[maxd];
V b[maxd];
ll v1[maxd],v2[maxd];
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll n,m;RLL2(n,m);
    FOR(i,1,n)
    {
        ll t,x;
        RLL2(t,x);b[x].pb(t);
    }
    FOR(i,1,m) RLL(a[i]);
    FOR(i,1,m) sort(all(b[i]));
    FOR(i,1,m)
        FOR(j,0,b[i].size()-1)
        {
            v2[b[i][j]]++;
            if(j >= a[i]) v1[b[i][j]]++;
        }

    ll p = 0, ans = 0;  // p表示当前选取的数量
    FOR(i,1,maxd-1)
    {
        v1[i] += v1[i-1];
        v2[i] += v2[i-1];
    }


    FOR(i,1,maxd-1)
    {
        if(v2[i] > p) p++; // 如果物品够选，着选
        if(p < v1[i]) ans += v1[i] - p;  // 如果物品选的数量没有超过当前超过容量的数量，则算上花费
    }
    PLN(ans);
    return 0;

entry.title: UCF Local Programming Contest 2015
entry.summary: UCF Local Contest 2015解题报告[东华大学 ACM 集训队]🔗
entry.content:
UCF Local Contest 2015解题报告[东华大学 ACM 集训队]🔗

F Balanced Strings

const int maxd = 505;
ll t;
map<char,ll> mp;
char s[maxd];
char k[] = "aeiouy";
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    RLL(t);ll ca = 0;
    FOR(i,0,6) mp[k[i]] = 1;
    while(t--)
    {
        RS(s+1);ll len = strlen(s+1);
        ll a= 0,b=0,flag=0,ans = 0;
        FOR(i,1,len)
        {
            if(s[i] == '?')
            {
                if(i%2) a++;
                else b++;
            }
            else if(mp[s[i]] != i%2) // 元音
            {
                flag =1;
                break;
            }
        }
        if(!flag) ans += pow(6,a) * pow(20,b);
        a = 0 , b= 0 ,flag = 0;
        FOR(i,1,len)
        {
            if(s[i] == '?')
            {
                if(i%2) a++;    // 辅音
                else b++;
            }
            else if(mp[s[i]] == i%2) // 位置错了
            {
                flag =1;
                break;
            }
        }
        if(!flag) ans += pow(20,a) * pow(6,b);
        printf("String #%d: %lld\n",++ca,ans);
        if(t) PN();
    }

    return 0;
}

G Towers of Hanoi Grid

const int maxd = 505;
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll t;RLL(t);
    ll ca = 0;
    while(t--)
    {
        printf("Grid #%d: ",++ca);
        ll d,n;RLL2(d,n);
        if(d>n*n-2*(n-1))PS("impossible\n");
        else {
            PLN(d*2*(n-1));
            PN();
        }
    }
    return 0;
}

H Reach for the Stars

const int maxd = 505;
char mp[11][11];
const ll fx[5]= {0,0,-1,1,0}, fy[5] = {-1,1,0,0,0};
ll n,m,ans;
void dfs(ll i,ll j,ll s,ll num)
{
//    PLN4(i,j,s,num);
//    FOR(i,1,n) PS(mp[i]+1);

    if(s >= ans) return;
    if(num == 0)
    {
        ans = min(ans,s);
        return ;
    }
    if(i == 1|| i >= n || j == 1|| j >= m ) return;
    if((num-1)/5+1+s >= ans) return;
    char tmp[5];
    FOR(p,0,4) tmp[p] = mp[i+fx[p]][j+fy[p]];
    ll cnt = 0,flag = 0;
    FOR(p,0,4) flag |= (tmp[p] == '.');
    FOR(p,0,4) cnt += (tmp[p] == '#');
//    PLN2(flag,cnt);
//    FOR(p,0,4) putchar(tmp[p]);
//    PN();
    if(!flag && cnt)
    {
        FOR(p,0,4) mp[i+fx[p]][j+fy[p]] = '@';
        if(j+1 < m) dfs(i,j+1,s+1,num - cnt);
        else dfs(i+1,2,s+1,num- cnt);
        FOR(p,0,4) mp[i+fx[p]][j+fy[p]] = tmp[p];
    }
    if(mp[i-1][j] == '#') return;
    if(j==2 && mp[i][1] == '#') return;
    if(j==m-1 && mp[i][m] == '#') return;
    if(j+1 < m) dfs(i,j+1,s,num);
    else dfs(i+1,2,s,num);
}
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll t;RLL(t);
    FOR(ca,1,t)
    {
        RLL2(n,m);ll num = 0;
        FOR(i,1,n) RS(mp[i]+1);
        FOR(i,1,n) FOR(j,1,m) num+=mp[i][j] == '#';
        if(mp[1][1] == '#'|| mp[1][m] == '#'||mp[n][1] == '#' || mp[n][m] == '#')
            printf("Image #%d: impossible\n\n",ca);
        else
        {
            ans = 1e9+10;dfs(2,2,0,num);
            if(ans == 1e9+10)printf("Image #%d: impossible\n\n",ca);
            else printf("Image #%d: %d\n\n",ca,ans);

        }
    }
    return 0;
}

I Longest Path

const int maxd = 505;
ll a[maxd][maxd];
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll t;RLL(t);
    while(t--)
    {
        ll n;RLL(n);
        FOR(i,1,n) FOR(j,1,n) RLL(a[i][j]);
        list<ll> b;
        b.pb(1);
        FOR(i,2,n)
        {
            ll flag =0;
            FF(it, b)
            {
                auto net = it; net++;
                if(net != b.end() && a[*it][i] && a[i][*net])
                {
                    b.insert(net,i);
                    flag=1;break;
                }
            }
            if(!flag)
            {
                if(a[*b.begin()][i]) b.pb(i);
                else b.pf(i);
            }
        }
        FF(it,b)
        {
            auto net = it; net++;
            PLL(*it);
            if(net == b.end()) PN();
            else PP();
        }

    }
    return 0;
}

J You Shall Pass

const ll maxd = 1e5+10;
const ll inf = 1e18;

struct edge{ll to,rev, flow;};
vector<edge> G[maxd];
void add(ll u,ll v,ll flow)
{
    G[u].push_back((edge) {v, (ll) G[v].size(), flow});
    G[v].push_back((edge) {u, (ll) G[u].size() - 1, 0});
}
ll d[maxd],in[maxd],out[maxd],k[maxd],s,t;
bool bfs()
{
    memset(d,-1,sizeof(d));d[s] = 0;
    queue<ll> que; que.push(s);
    while(!que.empty())
    {
        ll x = que.front(); que.pop();
        for(auto p: G[x]) if(p.flow > 0 && d[p.to] == -1) que.push(p.to),d[p.to] = d[x]+1;
    }
    return (d[t] != -1);
}
ll dfs(ll x,ll flow)
{
    if(x == t)  return flow;
    ll res = 0ll;
    F(G[x].size())
    {
        edge &e = G[x][i];ll v = e.to;
        if(e.flow > 0 && d[x]+1 == d[v])
        {
            ll tmp = dfs(v,min(flow,e.flow));
            flow -= tmp; e.flow -= tmp; res += tmp;
            G[v][e.rev].flow += tmp;
            if(!flow) break;
        }
    }
    if(!res) d[x] = -1;
    return res;
}
ll maxflow()
{
    ll res = 0;
    while(bfs()) res += dfs(s,inf);
    return res;
}

int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll T;RLL(T);
    while(T--)
    {
        ll n,sum = 0;RLL(n);
        double x;
        s = 0, t = n+2*n*n+1;
        FOR(i,1,n)
        {
            RLF(x);
            ll c = round(x*100);
            sum += c;
            add(s,i,c);
        }
        FOR(i,1,n)
        {
            RLF(x);
            ll c = round(x*100);
            sum += c;
            add(i,t,c);
        }
        FOR(i,1,n)FOR(j,1,n)
        {
            RLF(x);ll c = round(x*100);
            sum += c; sum+=c;
            add(s,n + (i-1) *n +j,c);
            add(n + (i-1) *n +j + n * n,t,c);

            add(n + (i-1) *n +j,i,inf);
            add(n + (i-1) *n +j,j,inf);
            add(i,n + (i-1) *n +j + n * n,inf);
            add(j,n + (i-1) *n +j + n * n,inf);
        }
        ll len =maxflow();
        double ans =1.0 *  (sum - len) / 100;
//        PLN2(sum,len);
        printf("%.2lf\n",ans);
        FOR(i,s,t) G[i].clear();
    }

    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「GYM 102501」2019-2020 ICPC Southwestern European Regional Programming Contest (SWERC 2019-20)
entry.content:
- A - Environment-Friendly Travel

大致题意
二维平面上给出两个点，S和T，你需要从S走到T , 你可以通过自驾或者搭火车从S前往T. 平面上有n个火车站，你只能在火车站搭火车前往任意另一个火车站。 每个火车站都有与其他火车站连接的线路。不同的线路使用的列车是不同的，列车[i]的费用为c[i] , 自驾的费用为c[0] 。 求前往T点 且总距离不超过B的最低费用

题解:
DP[i][j] 记录到达车站 i 时，已经行驶了 j 距离的最小费用。 这时就变成了最短路问题了，因为不带负边全，则可以用dijkstra 算法求解

G - Swapping Places

大致题意
有S个不同物种的小动物共 N只，他们排成了一行，物种x与物种y可能是好朋友，如果存在两只小动物，他们的位置相邻，且他们的是好朋友，则可以交换它们的位置。你想知道你能通过交换位置取得字典序最小的排列

题解
先将每个物种，按物种名字字典序的大小好编号
因为求的是字典序最小的序列
所以我们从前往后贪心的考虑考虑每个位置的动物

  • by Ravanla
//
// Created by Ravanla on 2020/2/25.
//

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
#define ff first
#define ss second
typedef long long ll;
typedef pair<int, int> pii;

map<string, int> m;
int w[210][210], cur[210];
int a[100010];
string ans[210];
int main(){
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false), cin.tie(0), cout.tie(0);
    int s,l,n,cnt = 0;
    cin >> s >> l >> n;//输入3 2 6
    for(int i = 1; i <= s; i++){
        string str;
        cin >> str;
        m[str]++;//在map中已经排好序了
        /*m[0].ff="ANT", m[1].ff="ANTILOPE", m[2].ff="CAT"*/
        /*m[0].ss = 1,   m[1].ss = 1,        m[2].ss = 1*/
        cur[i] = 1;
    }
    for(auto &i:m){//遍历m
//        i.ss = ++cnt;
//        ans[cnt] = i.ff;
        i.second = ++cnt;
        /*m[0].ff="ANT", m[1].ff="ANTILOPE", m[2].ff="CAT"*/
        /*m[0].ss = 1,   m[1].ss = 2,        m[2].ss = 3*/
        ans[cnt] = i.first;
        /*
        ans[1] = "ANT", ans[2] = "ANTILOPE", ans[3] = "CAT"
         * */
    }
    /*建立邻接矩阵，好友关系的为1*/
    for(int i = 1; i <= l; i++){
        string x,y;
        cin >> x >> y;
        int xx = m[x], yy = m[y];//找到对应名字的序号
        w[xx][yy] = w[yy][xx] = 1;
    }
    for(int i = 1; i <= n; i++){
        string str;
        cin >> str;//输入ANT CAT CAT ANTILOPE CAT ANT
        a[i] = m[str];
        /*a[1]=1, a[2]=3, a[3]=3, a[4]=2, a[5]=3, a[6]=1, */
    }
    //n=6队伍中有6个动物 s=3种动物  每个位置判断s个物种的情况
    for(int i = 1; i <= n; i++){
        for(int j = 1; j <= s; j++){
            //cur记录第j种动物应该排的位置 a记录对应位置是哪种动物 w是记录两种动物的关系
            //第j种动物应该排的位置小于总动物数的情况下
            //第j种动物应该排位置（cur[j]）在队伍中被优先级别高的排了（为-1）或者 第j种动物与第j种动物应该排位置（cur[j]）上原有的a[i]物种有关系
            //第j种动物排的位置++
            while(cur[j] <= n && (a[cur[j]]==-1 || w[j][a[cur[j]]]) ){
                cur[j]++;
            }
            if(a[cur[j]] == j){//第j种动物应该排位置 刚好为自己，那这个位置就属于j了
                cout << ans[j] << " ";//输出j物种
                a[cur[j]] = -1;//位置j物种已经用了
                break;
            }
            //这里解释：第一个位置被1物种占了的情况下判断第二个位置
            //因为第一个位置被占了，第一个物种判断第二个位置 cur[1]++ cur[1]=2
            //因为第二个位置原有的物种不为1物种，所以判断2物种了
            //cur[2]=1,先判断第一个位置
            //因为第一个位置被占了，第二个物种判断第二个位置 cur[2]++ cur[2]=2
            //因为第二个物种与当前位置原有的物种有关系，第二个物种判断第三个位置 cur[2]++ cur[2]=3
            //因为第二个物种与当前位置原有的物种有关系，第二个物种判断第四个位置 cur[2]++ cur[2]=4
            //因为第四个位置原有的物种就是自己且自己比刚刚判断的物种的优先级高，所以第四个位置原有的物种和前面两个交换
            //如果第四个位置原有的物种是第一个物种（2和1有友好关系），那第五第六个位置遇到2的话，2物种会跟在第四个位置后面（能交换的情况下，当然2与所有动物都是好朋友，所以能交换）

            // cur[j]的另一种解释
            //用数组**cur[j]** 表示如果存在某个 **j**的实际位置小于等于 **cur[j]**，则能把**j** 挪动到当前位置，如果w[j][a[cur[j]]] 不为0，则表示 cur[j] 即使在cur[j]+1 的位置也能通过交换到达cur[j]的位置，因此能加一。
        }
    }
    return 0;
}

H - Pseudo-Random Number Generator

  • 参考博客

大致题意
给出一个函数S，求 S(0) -> S(n-1) 中 ，有多少个偶数 ， N<263N< 2^{63}N<263

题解
因为2632^{63}263太大，但是 mod 只有 2402^{40}240 ，又因为该函数为递推函数，因此肯定有重复的，考虑寻找循环节，找出循环节后，大于循环节的部分直接除以循环节长度即可。
通过暴力可以发现，该函数为混循环(有点类似于无限循环小数，比如 1.34566666....，前几位是不循环的)因此我们要找出前面不循环的部分
前面不循环的部分长度 350125311
在此之后循环节 长度为 532254520 - 350125311
但该值还是太大，无法在有限时间内完成，也无法通过打表储存
于是我们考虑分段打表，运用分块的思想
考虑每K个数，记录一个值，对于第N项，我们只需从第N/K*项开始统计起，这样统计的时间复杂度就在 K以内了，当K为sqrt(N)时，时间与空间复杂度均为 sqrt(N)

mat[i][0] 表示S[i]项的值
mat[i][1] 前i项值为偶数的个数

const int maxd = 1005;
const ll mod = 1ll<<40;
const ll base = 5e6;
ll mat[1010][2] = {
        1611516670, 1,
        6995323118, 2500401,
        14370630249, 5004364,
        24473902285, 7500029,
        38312556854, 10006017,
        57274551969, 12506329,
        83248007737, 15011683,
        118826730177, 17517443,
        167560289742, 20012408,
        234323188514, 22530434,
        325792323073, 25031296,
        451094609069, 27539195,
        622741727028, 30040232,
        857898708083, 32538480,
        937685173, 35042602,
        6072677726, 37541450,
        13107744445, 40042828,
        22744003927, 42546233,
        35943646365, 45056959,
        54027907086, 47548216,
        78802032994, 50056831,
        112739509636, 52565704,
        159235062884, 55056278,
        222913708970, 57559660,
        310147760736, 60057168,
        429642460847, 62554179,
        593348380684, 65062411,
        817588294774, 67574933,
        295498034, 70077204,
        5192879414, 72572034,
        11901289737, 75074286,
        21092425584, 77586589,
        33681877906, 80089334,
        50930014590, 82577797,
        74557367833, 85076566,
        106926639410, 87569837,
        151258698876, 90060817,
        211997026857, 92557144,
        295206930517, 95067617,
        409189858068, 97582000,
        565345893787, 100089173,
        779223572048, 102578453,
        1072246754882, 105080524,
        4354683110, 107578420,
        10752858133, 110081437,
        19518274761, 112579315,
        31526697331, 115071718,
        47977804257, 117584728,
        70512631458, 120091493,
        101383583168, 122603663,
        143677078963, 125100277,
        201601781662, 127598938,
        280954761586, 130104566,
        389678281232, 132606644,
        538598461112, 135114812,
        742592321221, 137604957,
        1022070324749, 140110603,
        3554026557, 142613775,
        9655697881, 145118771,
        18014204912, 147616701,
        29466792348, 150119937,
        45154383935, 152614526,
        66642984633, 155117508,
        96085200428, 157608613,
        136417233148, 160106698,
        191671943332, 162605678,
        267368060404, 165108248,
        371063286307, 167605345,
        513107125545, 170101751,
        707668644954, 172599641,
        974225187667, 175085228,
        2790547793, 177572982,
        8611289031, 180074324,
        16584933110, 182564868,
        27507640334, 185067560,
        42470755600, 187569610,
        62966213954, 190070901,
        91040988045, 192573754,
        129505250351, 195073010,
        182194153727, 197571938,
        254367017868, 200067363,
        353236621546, 202571441,
        488691710416, 205056578,
        674235835123, 207563824,
        928397275086, 210056612,
        2061291639, 212555608,
        7611195984, 215046440,
        15215211602, 217558986,
        25631359205, 220055532,
        39898870311, 222551803,
        59446145748, 225059431,
        86223613511, 227563092,
        122903535528, 230050444,
        173156136173, 232565955,
        241996682198, 235069888,
        336303276921, 237573994,
        465478252203, 240074925,
        642434794044, 242579118,
        884883721897, 245073898,
        1367467361, 247575267,
        6660774750, 250065868,
        13913445317, 252566347,
        23846914106, 255061631,
        37457188797, 257561860,
        56101519545, 260064780,
        81642081850, 262557086,
        116629560400, 265048248,
        164557000612, 267539163,
        230202910861, 270039390
};
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT
    const ll pre = 350125311;// 循环节前面一段的长度
    const ll len = 532254520 - 350125311;// 循环节的长度
    const ll sum = 266177230 - 175147926;// 循环节所包含的偶数数量
    ll ans = 0,now = 0,n; RLL(n);
    if(n == 0)
    {
        PS("0");
        return 0;
    }
    n--;
    if(n > pre)
    {
        ans = (n - pre) / len;
        n -= ans *  len;
        ans *= sum;
    }

//    PLN2(ans,n);
    ans += mat[n/base][1];
    now = mat[n/base][0];
//    PLN2(ans,now);
    FOR(i,n/base*base+1,n)
    {
        ll x = (now + (now >> 20 ) + 12345) % mod;
        ans += ( x%2 == 0);
        now = x;
    }
    PLN(ans);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1288E」 Messenger Simulator
entry.summary:
Polycarp is a frequent user of the very popular messenger. He's chatting with his friends all the time. He has 𝑛 friends, numbered from 1 to 𝑛.

Recall that a permutation of size 𝑛 is an array of size 𝑛 such that each integer from 1 to 𝑛 occurs exactly once in this array.
entry.content:
Polycarp is a frequent user of the very popular messenger. He's chatting with his friends all the time. He has 𝑛 friends, numbered from 1 to 𝑛.

Recall that a permutation of size 𝑛 is an array of size 𝑛 such that each integer from 1 to 𝑛 occurs exactly once in this array.

So his recent chat list can be represented with a permutation 𝑝 of size 𝑛. 𝑝1 is the most recent friend Polycarp talked to, 𝑝2 is the second most recent and so on.

Initially, Polycarp's recent chat list 𝑝 looks like 1,2,…,𝑛 (in other words, it is an identity permutation).

After that he receives 𝑚 messages, the 𝑗-th message comes from the friend 𝑎𝑗. And that causes friend 𝑎𝑗 to move to the first position in a permutation, shifting everyone between the first position and the current position of 𝑎𝑗 by 1. Note that if the friend 𝑎𝑗 is in the first position already then nothing happens.

For example, let the recent chat list be 𝑝=[4,1,5,3,2]:

if he gets messaged by friend 3, then 𝑝 becomes [3,4,1,5,2];
if he gets messaged by friend 4, then 𝑝 doesn't change [4,1,5,3,2];
if he gets messaged by friend 2, then 𝑝 becomes [2,4,1,5,3].
For each friend consider all position he has been at in the beginning and after receiving each message. Polycarp wants to know what were the minimum and the maximum positions.

大致题意 📖

给你一个长度为 nnn的数组aaa， 开始时ai=ia_i = iai​=i
然后给你一个长度为mmm 的操作序列bbb，bib_ibi​ 表示将在第iii步的时候，将

链接 🔗

「CodeForces 1288E」 Messenger Simulator

题解 ❓

因为最多挪动mmm次，因此初始数组长度为n+mn+mn+m ，这样每次都往前添加即可，不会整体移动数组
然后树状数组维护前面有多少个数即可

代码

ll tree[maxd<<2];
ll a[maxd<<1],pos[maxd<<1],l[maxd],r[maxd];
void add(ll x, ll v)
{
    for(;x<(maxd<<2); x += (x& (-x))) tree[x] +=v;
}
ll query(ll x)
{
    ll ans = 0ll;
    for(;x; x -= (x & (-x))) ans += tree[x];
    return ans;
}
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll n,m;RLL2(n ,m);
    FOR(i,1,n)
    {
        pos[i] = i+m;
        add(i+m,1);
        l[i] = r[i] = query(i+m);
    }
    F(m)
    {
        ll x;RLL(x); l[x] = 1;
        r[x] = max(query(pos[x]),r[x]);
        add(pos[x],-1);
        pos[x] = m-i;
        add(pos[x],1);
    }
    FOR(i,1,n)
    {
        r[i] = max(query(pos[i]),r[i]);
        PLN2(l[i],r[i]);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1288D」 Minimax Problem
entry.summary:
You are given 𝑛 arrays 𝑎1, 𝑎2, ..., 𝑎𝑛; each array consists of exactly 𝑚 integers. We denote the 𝑦-th element of the 𝑥-th array as 𝑎𝑥,𝑦.

You have to choose two arrays 𝑎𝑖 and 𝑎𝑗 (1≤𝑖,𝑗≤𝑛, it is possible that 𝑖=𝑗). After that, you will obtain a new array 𝑏 consisting of 𝑚 integers, such that for every k∈[1,m]k \in [1, m]k∈[1,m] bk=max⁡(ai,k,aj,k)b_k = \max(a_{i, k}, a_{j, k})bk​=max(ai,k​,aj,k​) .

Your goal is to choose 𝑖𝑖i and 𝑗𝑗j so that the value of minmin⁡k=1mbk\min \limits_{k = 1}^{m} b_kk=1minm​bk​ is maximum possible.
entry.content:
You are given 𝑛 arrays 𝑎1, 𝑎2, ..., 𝑎𝑛; each array consists of exactly 𝑚 integers. We denote the 𝑦-th element of the 𝑥-th array as 𝑎𝑥,𝑦.

You have to choose two arrays 𝑎𝑖 and 𝑎𝑗 (1≤𝑖,𝑗≤𝑛, it is possible that 𝑖=𝑗). After that, you will obtain a new array 𝑏 consisting of 𝑚 integers, such that for every k∈[1,m]k \in [1, m]k∈[1,m] bk=max⁡(ai,k,aj,k)b_k = \max(a_{i, k}, a_{j, k})bk​=max(ai,k​,aj,k​) .

Your goal is to choose 𝑖𝑖i and 𝑗𝑗j so that the value of minmin⁡k=1mbk\min \limits_{k = 1}^{m} b_kk=1minm​bk​ is maximum possible.

大致题意 📖

给你n(<=3e5)n ( <= 3e5)n(<=3e5) 个数组，每个数组有m(<=8)m (<= 8)m(<=8) 个数
选择两个数组 ai,aja_i,a_jai​,aj​ , iii 可以等于jjj
定义数组bbb的每个项 k∈[1,m]k \in [1, m]k∈[1,m] bk=max⁡(ai,k,aj,k)b_k = \max(a_{i, k}, a_{j, k})bk​=max(ai,k​,aj,k​) .
定义s=min⁡k=1mbks = \min \limits_{k = 1}^{m} b_ks=k=1minm​bk​
求i,ji,ji,j，使sss最大

链接 🔗

「CodeForces 1288D」 Minimax Problem

题解 ❓

直接求显然很麻烦，注意到(m <= 8)我们考虑二分
单调性很显然，可以感性理解
接着考虑如何判断xxx是否满足条件
直接枚举是n2n^2n2的，但是因为我们只需要验证是否能每项都大于xxx，所以我们可以将每个大于等于xxx的数变成1，小于xxx的数变成0
这样的所有数组都会变成最多长为8位的0,10,10,1数组，最多有282^828个不同的数组
因此我们可以直接枚举这个数组 O(256∗256)O(256 * 256)O(256∗256)，即考虑是否存在两个数组的或 全为111

代码

const int maxd = 3e5+10;
ll a[maxd][10],ansl,ansr,n,m,vis[300];
bool check(ll x)
{
    memset(vis,0,sizeof(vis));
    FOR(i,1,n)
    {
        ll now = 0;
        FOR(j,1,m) if(a[i][j] >= x) now |= 1<<(j-1);
        vis[now] = i;
    }
    F(1<<m)
        FOR(j,0,(1<<m)-1)
        if(vis[i] && vis[j] && ( (i|j) == (((1<<m)-1))))
        {
            ansl = vis[i], ansr = vis[j];
            return true;
        }
    return false;
}
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    RLL2(n ,m);
    FOR(i,1,n) FOR(j,1,m) RLL(a[i][j]);
    ll l = 0,r = 1e9;
    while(l<=r)
    {
        ll x = (l+r)>>1;
        if(check(x)) l = x+1;
        else r = x-1;
    }
    PLN2(ansl,ansr);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1198E」 Rectangle Painting 2
entry.summary:
There is a square grid of size 𝑛×𝑛. Some cells are colored in black, all others are colored in white. In one operation you can select some rectangle and color all its cells in white. It costs min(ℎ,𝑤) to color a rectangle of size ℎ×𝑤. You are to make all cells white for minimum total cost.

The square is large, so we give it to you in a compressed way. The set of black cells is the union of 𝑚 rectangles.
entry.content:
There is a square grid of size 𝑛×𝑛. Some cells are colored in black, all others are colored in white. In one operation you can select some rectangle and color all its cells in white. It costs min(ℎ,𝑤) to color a rectangle of size ℎ×𝑤. You are to make all cells white for minimum total cost.

The square is large, so we give it to you in a compressed way. The set of black cells is the union of 𝑚 rectangles.

大致题意 📖

有一个n×n(n<=1e9)n \times n (n <= 1e9)n×n(n<=1e9)的矩阵，其中有m(m<=50)m (m <= 50)m(m<=50) 个黑块，其余为白块，你可以选择一个n×mn \times mn×m矩阵，将其染成白色，费用为min(n,m)min(n,m)min(n,m)，求将涂染成全白的最小费用

链接 🔗

「CodeForces 1198E」 Rectangle Painting 2

题解 ❓

1198D1198D1198D的升级版，不过是两个问题
相较上个问题,maxmaxmax -> minminmin ,因此可以知道，只选[1,m]或[n,1]是最优的,因为费用都为 111
因此就是选最少的行和列，覆盖所有黑格子。于是题目就转化为网络流问题了

代码

struct
{
    ll x,y,r,c;
}a[maxd];
ll fx[maxd],fy[maxd],tot,sx,sy;
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll n,m; RLL(m);RLL(n); init();
    F(n)
    {
        RLL(fx[sx]);a[i].x = fx[sx++];
        RLL(fy[sy]);a[i].y = fy[sy++];
        RLL(fx[sx]);a[i].r = ++fx[sx++];
        RLL(fy[sy]);a[i].c = ++fy[sy++];
    }
    sort(fx,fx+sx);sort(fy,fy+sy);
    sx =  unique(fx,fx+sx) - fx;
    sy =  unique(fy,fy+sy) - fy;
    s = 0, t = sx+sy+1;
    FOR(i,1,sx-1) addedge(s,i,fx[i] - fx[i-1]);
    FOR(i,1,sy-1) addedge(sx - 1 + i,t,fy[i] - fy[i-1]);
    F(n)
    {
        a[i].x = lower_bound(fx, fx + sx, a[i].x) - fx;
        a[i].y = lower_bound(fy, fy + sy, a[i].y) - fy;
        a[i].r = lower_bound(fx, fx + sx, a[i].r) - fx;
        a[i].c = lower_bound(fy, fy + sy, a[i].c) - fy;
        for (int x = a[i].x; x < a[i].r; x++)
            for (int y = a[i].y; y < a[i].c; y++)  addedge(x + 1, sx + y, 2e9);
    }
    PLN(maxflow());
 
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1198F」GCD Groups 2
entry.summary: You are given an array of 𝑛 integers. You need to split all integers into two groups so that the GCD of all integers in the first group is equal to one and the GCD of all integers in the second group is equal to one.
entry.content:
You are given an array of 𝑛 integers. You need to split all integers into two groups so that the GCD of all integers in the first group is equal to one and the GCD of all integers in the second group is equal to one.

The GCD of a group of integers is the largest non-negative integer that divides all the integers in the group.

Both groups have to be non-empty.

大致题意 📖

给你NNN 个数，求一种方法使得将这NNN个数分成两堆，每堆的GCDGCDGCD都为111

链接 🔗

「CodeForces 1198F」GCD Groups 2

题解 ❓

随机数 + 贪心
随机生成数列顺序，然后贪心，如果丢左堆，能使得左堆gcd变小，则丢左堆，否则丢右堆

代码

const ll maxd = 4e5+10;
ll a[maxd],b[maxd],ans[maxd];
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll n;RLL(n);
    FOR(i,1,n) RLL(a[i]);
    FOR(i,1,n) b[i] = i;
    clock_t st = clock();
    while(clock() - st  < 0.4 * CLOCKS_PER_SEC) // 时限小于0.4s时
    {
        random_shuffle(b+1,b+1+n); // 将随机打乱顺序
        ll x = 0 , y = 0;
        FOR(i,1,n)
        {
            ll t = gcd(x,a[b[i]]);
            if(t == x) y = gcd(a[b[i]],y),ans[b[i]] = 2;
            else x = t, ans[b[i]] = 1;
        }
        if(x == 1 && y == 1)
        {
            PS("YES");
            FOR(i,1,n) PLP(ans[i]);
            return 0;
        }
    }
    PS("NO");
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1198D」 Rectangle Painting 1
entry.summary: There is a square grid of size n×nn \times nn×n. Some cells are colored in black, all others are colored in white. In one operation you can select some rectangle and color all its cells in white. It costs max⁡(h,w)\max(h, w)max(h,w) to color a rectangle of size h×wh \times wh×w. You are to make all cells white for minimum total cost.
entry.content:
There is a square grid of size n×nn \times nn×n. Some cells are colored in black, all others are colored in white. In one operation you can select some rectangle and color all its cells in white. It costs max⁡(h,w)\max(h, w)max(h,w) to color a rectangle of size h×wh \times wh×w. You are to make all cells white for minimum total cost.

大致题意 📖

有一个n×nn \times nn×n的矩阵，其中有mmm 个黑块，其余为白块，你可以选择一个n×mn \times mn×m矩阵，将其染成白色，费用为max(n,m)max(n,m)max(n,m)，求将涂染成全白的最小费用

链接 🔗

「CodeForces 1198D」 Rectangle Painting 1

题解 ❓

动态规划O(n4)O(n^4)O(n4)，枚举每块矩阵的长宽，进行切割求最小值
一种比较优美的实现 SC.ldxcaicai

代码

const ll maxd = 55;
ll a[maxd][maxd],dp[maxd][maxd][maxd][maxd];
char s[maxd];
ll dfs(ll x1,ll y1,ll x2,ll y2)
{
    if(dp[x1][y1][x2][y2] != -1) return dp[x1][y1][x2][y2]; // 存在值时
    if(x1 > x2  || y1 > y2) return dp[x1][y1][x2][y2]=0; // 边界
    if(x1 == x2 && y1 == y2) return dp[x1][y1][x2][y2] = a[x1][y1]; // 1*1矩阵
    ll now = max(x2-x1+1,y2-y1+1); //全部涂的价值
    FOR(a,x1,x2-1) now = min(now,dfs(x1,y1,a,y2) + dfs(a+1,y1,x2,y2));   // 枚举宽
    FOR(a,y1,y2-1) now = min(now,dfs(x1,y1,x2,a) + dfs(x1,a+1,x2,y2)); // 枚举长
    return dp[x1][y1][x2][y2] = now;
}
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll n; RLL(n);
    FOR(i,1,n)
    {
        RS(s+1);
        FOR(j,1,n) a[i][j] =  ( s[j]  == '#');
    }
    memset(dp,-1,sizeof(dp));
    PLN(dfs(1,1,n,n));
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1198C」 Matching vs Independent Set
entry.summary:
You are given a graph with 3⋅𝑛 vertices and 𝑚 edges. You are to find a matching of 𝑛 edges, or an independent set of 𝑛 vertices.

A set of edges is called a matching if no two edges share an endpoint.

A set of vertices is called an independent set if no two vertices are connected with an edge.
entry.content:
You are given a graph with 3⋅𝑛 vertices and 𝑚 edges. You are to find a matching of 𝑛 edges, or an independent set of 𝑛 vertices.

A set of edges is called a matching if no two edges share an endpoint.

A set of vertices is called an independent set if no two vertices are connected with an edge.

大致题意 📖

给你一张3∗n3*n3∗n点mmm边的简单图（不带重边与负环）
找出nnn条独立边(匹配)或者点数为nnn的独立点集

链接 🔗

「CodeForces 1198C」 Matching vs Independent Set

题解 ❓

先枚举，如果一条边E(x,y)E(x,y)E(x,y) 中的xxx 与yyy都没有出现过，那么该边绝对不会与前面的边有共同交点，因此该边属于匹配。
剩余没有被边覆盖的边一定为独立点，因为如果剩下的点Vi,VjV_i,V_jVi​,Vj​中存在E(Vi,Vj)E(V_i,V_j)E(Vi​,Vj​),那么一定会被选入到匹配中
如果匹配数kkk大于nnn则输出匹配，否则剩余点数为n−2∗k>n(k<n)n - 2 * k > n (k< n)n−2∗k>n(k<n)

代码

const ll maxd = 4e5+10;
int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    ll t;RLL(t);
    while(t--)
    {
        ll n,m,x,y;RLL2(n,m);
        V vis((3*n)+1,0),ans;
        F(m)
        {
            RLL2(x,y);
            if(!vis[x] && !vis[y])
            {
                vis[x] = vis[y] = 1;
                ans.pb(i+1);
            }
        }
 
        if(ans.size()>=n)
        {
            PS("Matching");
            ll tot = 0;
            for(auto x:ans) {
                PLP(x);tot++;
                if(tot == n) break;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            PS("IndSet");
            ll tot = 0;
            FOR(i,1,3*n)
                if(!vis[i])
                {
                    PLP(i);tot++;
                    if (tot == n) break;
                }
        }
        PN();
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1284D」New Year and Conference
entry.summary:
Filled with optimism, Hyunuk will host a conference about how great this new year will be!

The conference will have 𝑛 lectures. Hyunuk has two candidate venues 𝑎 and 𝑏. For each of the 𝑛 lectures, the speaker specified two time intervals [𝑠𝑎𝑖,𝑒𝑎𝑖] (𝑠𝑎𝑖≤𝑒𝑎𝑖) and [𝑠𝑏𝑖,𝑒𝑏𝑖] (𝑠𝑏𝑖≤𝑒𝑏𝑖). If the conference is situated in venue 𝑎, the lecture will be held from 𝑠𝑎𝑖 to 𝑒𝑎𝑖, and if the conference is situated in venue 𝑏, the lecture will be held from 𝑠𝑏𝑖 to 𝑒𝑏𝑖. Hyunuk will choose one of these venues and all lectures will be held at that venue.

Two lectures are said to overlap if they share any point in time in common. Formally, a lecture held in interval [𝑥,𝑦] overlaps with a lecture held in interval [𝑢,𝑣] if and only if max(𝑥,𝑢)≤min(𝑦,𝑣).
entry.content:
Filled with optimism, Hyunuk will host a conference about how great this new year will be!

The conference will have 𝑛 lectures. Hyunuk has two candidate venues 𝑎 and 𝑏. For each of the 𝑛 lectures, the speaker specified two time intervals [𝑠𝑎𝑖,𝑒𝑎𝑖] (𝑠𝑎𝑖≤𝑒𝑎𝑖) and [𝑠𝑏𝑖,𝑒𝑏𝑖] (𝑠𝑏𝑖≤𝑒𝑏𝑖). If the conference is situated in venue 𝑎, the lecture will be held from 𝑠𝑎𝑖 to 𝑒𝑎𝑖, and if the conference is situated in venue 𝑏, the lecture will be held from 𝑠𝑏𝑖 to 𝑒𝑏𝑖. Hyunuk will choose one of these venues and all lectures will be held at that venue.

Two lectures are said to overlap if they share any point in time in common. Formally, a lecture held in interval [𝑥,𝑦] overlaps with a lecture held in interval [𝑢,𝑣] if and only if max(𝑥,𝑢)≤min(𝑦,𝑣).

We say that a participant can attend a subset 𝑠 of the lectures if the lectures in 𝑠 do not pairwise overlap (i.e. no two lectures overlap). Note that the possibility of attending may depend on whether Hyunuk selected venue 𝑎 or venue 𝑏 to hold the conference.

A subset of lectures 𝑠 is said to be venue-sensitive if, for one of the venues, the participant can attend 𝑠, but for the other venue, the participant cannot attend 𝑠.

A venue-sensitive set is problematic for a participant who is interested in attending the lectures in 𝑠 because the participant cannot be sure whether the lecture times will overlap. Hyunuk will be happy if and only if there are no venue-sensitive sets. Determine whether Hyunuk will be happy.

链接🔗

「CodeForces 1284D」New Year and Conference

题解

一种很优美的做法，代码量少
参考 xht37's blog
这里对其代码进行解释

代码

const ll maxd = 1e5+10;

ll sa[maxd],sb[maxd],ea[maxd],eb[maxd],a[maxd*4];
ll n,m,tot;
V l[maxd*4],r[maxd*4];


ll solve()
{
    FOR(i,1,m) l[i].clear(),r[i].clear();
    FOR(i,1,n) l[sa[i]].pb(i), r[ea[i]].pb(i); // l表示在时间i，有那些会议开始了，r表示结束了
    multiset<ll,greater<ll> > L;
    multiset<ll> R;
    FOR(i,1,m)      //枚举时间
    {
        for(ll x:l[i]) L.insert(sb[x]), R.insert(eb[x]); // 因为会议x开始了，所以将再另一边的会议丢进集合，也表示开始了
        if(L.size() && *L.begin() > *R.begin()) return 1ll; // 如果在集合中出现了断点，说明没有相交，而此时我们枚举的会议都是相交的，所以这里会出现 venue-sensitive
        for(ll x:r[i]) L.erase(sb[x]),R.erase(eb[x]);
    }
    return 0ll;
}

int main()
{
//    __IN;__OUT;
    RLL(n);
    FOR(i,1,n) RLL4(sa[i],ea[i],sb[i],eb[i]);
    FOR(i,1,n) a[++tot] = sa[i];
    FOR(i,1,n) a[++tot] = sb[i];
    FOR(i,1,n) a[++tot] = ea[i];
    FOR(i,1,n) a[++tot] = eb[i];
    sort(a+1,a+1+tot);
    m = unique(a+1,a+1+tot) - a - 1; // 因为要枚举时间，所以需要离散化
    FOR(i,1,n) sa[i] = lower_bound(a+1,a+1+m,sa[i]) - a;
    FOR(i,1,n) sb[i] = lower_bound(a+1,a+1+m,sb[i]) - a;
    FOR(i,1,n) ea[i] = lower_bound(a+1,a+1+m,ea[i]) - a;
    FOR(i,1,n) eb[i] = lower_bound(a+1,a+1+m,eb[i]) - a;
    ll flag = solve(); swap(sa,sb);swap(ea,eb); flag|= solve();

    if(flag) PS("NO"); else PS("YES");

    return 0;
}
